revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>"
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Templates with draft categories
Bot: remove deleted category Unused templates
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{Draft categories|↵}}" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Flag%2Blink here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Flag%2Blink for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{#invoke:flag|deco|{{{2}}}|variant={{{variant|}}}|size={{{size|}}}}} {{#ifexist: {{{1}}} {{getalias|{{{2}}}}}
  |[[{{{1}}} {{getalias|{{{2}}}}}|{{{name|{{getalias|{{{2}}}|shortname}}}}}]]
  |{{#ifexist:{{{1}}} {{iso2country|{{ISO 3166 code|{{{2}}}}}|article=yes|mode=unique}}
     |[[{{{1}}} {{iso2country|{{ISO 3166 code|{{{2}}}}}|article=yes|mode=unique}}|{{{name|{{getalias|{{{2}}}|shortname}}}}}]]
     |[[{{getalias|{{{2}}}}}|{{{name|{{getalias|{{{2}}}|shortname}}}}}]]
   }}
}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

<noinclude>
<noinclude>\n<noinclude></noinclude>
\n
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
